title: sir.attribution.v0
description: Attribution result from the SIR signal correlation pipeline. The confidence field is the primary policy key; the remaining fields are emitted when available and will become required in v1.

confidence.description: Attribution confidence level. Policy rules key on this field. high=enforced boundary; medium=declared intent or mediated action; low=observed runtime only; unknown=no usable signals.

methods.description: Signal reliability methods that contributed to this attribution, in descending confidence order.

spoofing_risk.description: Risk that actor attribution was spoofed. high=span forged or span absent with no fallback; medium=span absent but runtime fallback present; low=span present but unverified; none=enforced boundary verified.
